name: Pipli / Parakeet Tourist Complex
message: Welcome to Kurukshetra! You are near the Pipli highway crossing and Parakeet Tourist Complex. Drive safely!

name: National Institute of Design (NID)
message: You are passing by the National Institute of Design (NID) campus in Umri.

name: NIELIT Kurukshetra
message: You are near NIELIT Kurukshetra (Govt. Polytechnic Campus). Need information on their digital courses?

name: DC Office / Mini Secretariat
message: You are near the Mini Secretariat (DC Office). Do you need to know about any administrative services or officers?

name: Dronacharya Stadium
message: You are close to Dronacharya Stadium. Looking for district sports facilities or events?

name: Kurukshetra Panorama & Science Centre
message: You are near the Panorama and Science Centre! It features a brilliant 3D diorama of the Mahabharata war.

name: Sannihit Sarovar
message: You are near the sacred Sannihit Sarovar, believed to be the permanent abode of Lord Vishnu.

name: Kurukshetra Development Board (KDB)
message: You are near the Kurukshetra Development Board (KDB) office, the authority managing the 48 Kos tirthas.

name: Brahma Sarovar
message: You are very close to the holy Brahma Sarovar! Would you like to know more about its history?

name: Sheikh Chilli Tomb
message: You are near the Sheikh Chilli Tomb, a beautiful Mughal-era architectural marvel.

name: Bhadrakali Temple
message: You are near the Bhadrakali Temple, one of the 51 Shakti Peethas. Click to read about its significance.

name: Kurukshetra University (KUK)
message: You are at the Kurukshetra University (KUK) campus. Do you need the university map or department info?

name: NIT Kurukshetra
message: You are passing by the National Institute of Technology (NIT) Kurukshetra campus.

name: Jyotisar
message: You are near Jyotisar, the sacred site where Lord Krishna delivered the Bhagavad Gita.

name: Saraswati Tirtha (Pehowa)
message: You have reached Pehowa. You are near the sacred Saraswati Tirtha. Need directions to the ghats?
